formLabelsMissing.element:
<input
          ref={ref}
          id={inputId}
          className={[
            'ui-input',
            hasError && 'ui-input--error',
            textMode && 'ui-input--text',
            className,
          ].filter(Boolean).join(' ')}
          disabled={disabled}
          aria-invalid={hasError}
          aria-describedby={hasError ? `${inputId}-error` : undefined}
          {...rest}
        />
formLabelsMissing.suggestion: Add a label element with htmlFor attribute or use aria-label/aria-labelledby

<input
          id={inputId}
          type="checkbox"
          checked={checked}
          onChange={handleChange}
          disabled={disabled}
          role="switch"
          aria-checked={checked}
        />
